items.title: Lynn century tames Bears as Northants march to four from four
items.summary: Opener sparkles in unbeaten knock, as Webster's 97 goes unrewarded
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Auchinleck win Scottish Junior Cup for 15th time
items.summary: Auchinleck Talbot come from behind to beat Ayrshire rivals Largs Thistle and extend their record of lifting the Scottish Junior Cup to a 15th time.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: IPL 2026 Final RCB vs GT | RCB at 126/4 after 12 overs
items.summary: A top-heavy GT lost their in-form batters inside the powerplay and questionable rejigging of the batting line-up saw the 2022 winners losing the plot completely.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
